## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format` run on changed Dart files
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes locally
- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] Manual verification completed for affected flows

## Risk Check

- [ ] No secrets or local env files included
- [ ] No `node_modules`, build output, or local temp files included
- [ ] Generated files only included when intentionally required
- [ ] Lockfiles updated intentionally

## Screens / Flows Checked

- [ ] Customer app
- [ ] Admin app flows
- [ ] Checkout
- [ ] Orders / delivery
